tools.name: get_cpu_info
tools.description: Read and parse CPU information from /proc/cpuinfo. Returns processor details including model, cores, frequency, and capabilities.

format.description: Output format: 'summary' for key stats or 'detailed' for all information

tools.name: get_memory_info
tools.description: Read and parse memory information from /proc/meminfo. Returns total, free, available memory, swap usage, and cache information.

tools.name: get_process_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific process from /proc/[pid]/. Returns process status, memory usage, command line, and environment.

tools.name: list_processes
tools.description: List all running processes by scanning /proc directory. Returns process IDs with basic information like name and state.

tools.name: get_network_stats
tools.description: Read network statistics from /proc/net/dev. Returns bytes/packets transmitted and received per interface.

interface.description: Specific network interface (e.g., 'eth0', 'wlan0'), or omit for all interfaces

tools.name: get_system_uptime
tools.description: Read system uptime from /proc/uptime. Returns how long the system has been running and idle time.

tools.name: get_load_average
tools.description: Read system load average from /proc/loadavg. Returns 1, 5, and 15 minute load averages.

tools.name: get_disk_stats
tools.description: Read disk I/O statistics from /proc/diskstats. Returns read/write operations and sectors for block devices.

device.description: Specific device name (e.g., 'sda', 'nvme0n1'), or omit for all devices

tools.name: get_filesystem_mounts
tools.description: Read mounted filesystems from /proc/mounts. Returns mount points, filesystem types, and mount options.

tools.name: get_interrupts
tools.description: Read interrupt statistics from /proc/interrupts. Returns interrupt counts per CPU for each IRQ.
